description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized male figure standing atop a cylindrical pedestal, mounted on a square stone base. The man is dressed in a suit and appears to be in the act of tipping his hat with his right hand, a gesture often associated with greeting or respect. The figure's posture is slightly forward-leaning, suggesting movement or a bow. The surface of the sculpture has a greenish patina, typical of aged bronze, while the pedestal and base are made of a gray stone. The details of the clothing, facial features, and hat are finely rendered, giving the piece a realistic and dignified appearance. The overall composition elevates the figure, making it a prominent focal point suitable for public display.
description: A realistic bronze statue of a man tipping his hat, standing on a cylindrical stone pedestal with a square base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man tipping his hat, with clear visibility of his face and forward-leaning gesture.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the back of the suit and the hat raised above his head.
description_view_2: Direct rear view showing the back of the figure and the cylindrical pedestal.
description_view_3: Side/front view emphasizing the man's bowed head and the hat held forward.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a white background.
